instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect clutch slip during operation.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect slip when Clutch_Slip exceeds Slip_Threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Clutch_Slip > Slip_Threshold THEN Clutch_Slip_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall increase clutch pressure when slip is detected.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall increase hydraulic pressure when Clutch_Slip exceeds Slip_Threshold.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect persistent clutch slip.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when Clutch_Slip persists longer than Slip_Duration_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Clutch_Slip > Slip_Threshold AND Slip_Duration > Slip_Duration_Limit THEN Clutch_Slip_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall compare engine speed and transmission input speed to detect slip.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall calculate slip as difference between Engine_RPM and Input_Shaft_RPM.

L4_requirements: IF Clutch_Slip > Slip_Threshold THEN Clutch_Slip_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect abnormal slip during gear engagement.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall monitor slip during clutch engagement phase.

L4_requirements: IF Clutch_Slip > Engagement_Slip_Limit THEN Clutch_Slip_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect slip caused by hydraulic pressure loss.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect slip when Clutch_Pressure is below Minimum_Pressure.

L4_requirements: IF Clutch_Pressure < Minimum_Pressure THEN Clutch_Slip_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall isolate clutch slip fault sources.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall identify fault source when Clutch_Slip_Fault equals TRUE.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall limit torque during excessive clutch slip.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall request torque reduction when Clutch_Slip exceeds Critical_Slip.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall maintain safe operation during slip faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall maintain safe gear when Clutch_Slip_Fault equals TRUE.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall clear slip fault after recovery.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall clear slip fault when Clutch_Slip returns below threshold.
